confidence_flags: doc_page_start/end are inferred 1:1 from the printed sheet sequence A-01..A-26 (each row maps to exactly one document page); not separately printed as page numbers on this sheet itself
warnings: Sheet A-01 contains 3 distinct patterns side by side, inventoried first: this per-sheet architectural index (left column 'รายการแบบสถาปัตยกรรม (A)'), a material spec list (middle column 'รายการวัสดุ'), and a drawing-symbol legend (right column 'รายการสัญลักษณ์ประกอบแบบ'). Split into 3 sibling files: _หน้า03_index.json (this file), _หน้า03_material_list.json, _หน้า03_symbol_legend.json.

DISCREPANCY WORTH HUMAN REVIEW: the title block prints 'A-01' and '26' (total sheet count = 26), and the task's assigned page range (หน้า03-หน้า28, 26 pages) maps 1:1 onto A-01..A-26 -- but the index table itself only has visible title text for 25 rows (A-01 through A-25, ending at 'แบบขยาย รั้วแบบที่ 2'). No 26th title text was legible in the row below it in this image. This could mean: (a) the 26th title text exists but was cut off/overlaps the signature block at this resolution and needs a zoom re-check, (b) the printed document itself has this gap (a real-world inconsistency, not a transcription error), or (c) sheet A-26 is a real physical sheet whose title simply wasn't filled into this particular index table when the document was produced. Will be resolved/cross-checked once หน้า28 (expected A-26) is read later in this same pass.

This house (บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 5, AR 58005) has notably FEWER architecture sheets than house #4 (26 vs 27) despite being described in the grid master file as a LARGER footprint (13.40m x 9.00m) -- the reduction comes from only 2 building sections (รูปตัด 1-2, A-11/A-12) instead of house #4's 3 (A-11/A-12/A-13), which shifts every subsequent sheet number down by 1 relative to house #4's numbering.

Title block: 'แบบบ้านสานฝัน ของขวัญปีใหม่ คนไทยมีความสุข' / 'บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 5', เลขที่แบบ AR 58005, sheet A-01 of 26 -- this is the 5th sister design in the same government housing program as houses 1-4 (AR 58001/58002/58003/58004). Date field (วัน/เดือน/ปี) reads '19/10/59' matching every prior sister house's A-01 sheet exactly -- read as printed rather than assumed to be a template carryover error, but flagged since it seems unlikely 5 different house designs were all dated the identical day; not independently re-verified at full zoom.

Approving signatory name at bottom right ('นายเกียรติศักดิ์ จันทรา' / วิศวกรใหญ่, and the อธิบดีกรมโยธาธิการและผังเมือง name below it) is small handwritten/printed text, transcribed by carryover from houses #2-#4's identical-looking signature block rather than independently re-verified pixel-by-pixel on this house's own copy -- flagged for human review if exact name spelling matters.
